passes.head: f3e7841a4b48e0b3d3bdfebf7b11efe6ec5a2aad
passes.evidence: Recorded frontier range 37e3dc2094fb84d65afd7da33bddef6ed9ebc4c7..f3e7841a4b48e0b3d3bdfebf7b11efe6ec5a2aad. Fresh startup, world, and runtime passes inspected the pinned 1b6f4dbb15ec3d5a2bcf5a7f8f3177cd3f134242 snapshot; their accepted changes were independently integrated through f3e7841a4b48e0b3d3bdfebf7b11efe6ec5a2aad. Counts: 40 raw, 27 deduplicated, 6 confirmed, 6 applied, 0 deferred, 0 unverified. Removed unused startup imports and a helper parameter, consolidated deity lookup, removed redundant exactMatch, and replaced duplicated runtime error flags with one sentinel. Retained source-shaped mkclass recomputation after measuring 1.9-4.6 microseconds per call because its inputs are mutable. Warnings: bundled independent workflow was unavailable; startup had no independent pool, world hit a thread limit, and runtime used a direct three-lens verification after nested agents were blocked. Validation: 370 tests and monster, object, and dungeon generated-data checks passed; behavior and PRNG order were preserved.

passes.head: db2ab36938751e3d49b9385a014a3074784669bb
passes.evidence: Clarity review exact range 37e3dc2094fb84d65afd7da33bddef6ed9ebc4c7..f3e7841a4b48e0b3d3bdfebf7b11efe6ec5a2aad: 15 raw, 14 deduplicated, 9 confirmed and applied, 0 deferred, 0 unverified. It clarified the six-field runSegment contract including DST and storage, prompt-versus-menu behavior, source headers, the dungeon pd comment, and test literal intent. Warning: the bundled workflow was unavailable; one independent child ran and the remaining lenses were direct. Correctness review exact range 37e3dc2094fb84d65afd7da33bddef6ed9ebc4c7..db2ab36938751e3d49b9385a014a3074784669bb: 18 raw, 9 deduplicated, 0 confirmed, 0 applied, 0 deferred, 0 unverified. Notable rejections were transitional replay scaffolding, fixed-time DST normalization, option aliases and catalogs, generated catalogs, timer cleanup, off-screen name retries, mkclass caching, concurrency outside the serial runtime contract, and storage/startup flow; upstream and recorder-patch evidence supported each rejection. Warnings: six finder perspectives and three judgments were reproduced directly because the workflow and native subagents were unavailable; isolated fresh C differentials lacked the recorder install. Main fresh differential evidence separately found the known unported special-level generation boundary, not a regression in this range. Validation: 370 tests, all three generated-data checks, git diff check, and 103 development screens passed; no holdout ran.

passes.head: db2ab36938751e3d49b9385a014a3074784669bb
passes.evidence: Exact range 37e3dc2094fb84d65afd7da33bddef6ed9ebc4c7..db2ab36938751e3d49b9385a014a3074784669bb. Counts: 16 raw, 10 deduplicated, 0 confirmed, 0 applied, 0 deferred, 0 unverified. Rejected generated-catalog compression, replacing C union aliases, replacing fruit byte helpers with string operations, removing inventory preflight and projections, merging generation and lifecycle environments, factoring distinct upstream predicates, inlining source-shaped helpers, deleting compatibility exports, relocating source-local tables, and removing artifact cloning. Upstream traceability, tested atomic failure behavior, byte and union semantics, generated-data integrity, mutable per-game state, and planned seams supplied counter-evidence. Warning: the skill reference was available in the fresh process, but its Claude-based workflow was prohibited; one fresh Codex reviewer reproduced all search lenses and gave every candidate three direct judgments. Validation: focused object tests, 370 full tests, and the generated object check passed; final diff was empty and no holdout ran.

Focused tests and all 374 tests passed; follow-up correctness found 0 raw, 0 deduplicated, 0 confirmed and explicitly rejected the serialization-exception concern. No holdout ran.

passes.head: f140abfaa499b2e8d7648fffc5c0fb73e33a5c73
passes.evidence: Formal full correctness milestone. Exact reviewed ranges: startup 71e40ad128009c7959c361aaa7946f10a18528fe..48ec9a8adbab826305a93f4108bf270535308064; objects/runtime and all three world passes 88ccb28d900bfc81e76f092f7b34218dbcbabba9..48ec9a8adbab826305a93f4108bf270535308064; hero and interaction 37e3dc2094fb84d65afd7da33bddef6ed9ebc4c7..48ec9a8adbab826305a93f4108bf270535308064. Counts by pass, shown as raw/deduplicated/confirmed/applied/deferred: startup 10/10/10/9/1; objects-runtime 15/14/8/3/5; world-level 13/13/9/2/7; world-creatures 17/16/14/6/8; world-effects 10/10/8/8/0; hero 14/14/9/4/5; interaction 26/23/23/14/9. Combined formal counts: 105 raw, 100 deduplicated, 81 confirmed, 46 applied, 35 deferred, 19 rejected, 0 unverified. Fixes cover complete glyph validation and symbol ownership, play-mode and reroll boundaries, effective attributes and calendar serialization, object preflight/discovery/inventory effects, mineralization and monster relocation, pet/monster/trap ownership, burial and burn lifecycles, visibility, terrain/trap/altar/RGB rendering, state-owned input, TTY menu and message cleanup, and their source-order tests. Deferrals are controlled test gaps and broader unported display/status/perception or world branches; the occupied-arrival-stair integration remains covered only by source-shaped components. Optional performance finders ran for world-level, world-effects, and interaction; optional concurrency ran for startup and interaction; all returned zero findings. Notable rejections retained upstream artifact assignment, disco insertion, lamplit cleanup, complete worn-slot scans, source-shaped world contracts, byyou coordinates, burial naming, duplicated visibility simplification, canonical hero representation, and serial runtime assumptions with source counter-evidence. Audit sessions and usage: startup 019f861e-1d13-7221-aa26-5ee5cda76c02, 1774688 input/1704960 cached/12828 output/2563 reasoning; objects-runtime 019f861e-1258-7d02-96a6-2e31b0025f02, 1708721/1637632/13201/3612; world-level 019f8620-004a-7ba2-8146-b94b44573bb1, 1629837/1558784/12811/1227; world-creatures session unavailable, 2026117/1947392/14642/3122; world-effects 019f8638-ac18-7462-b5dc-65ea16c03386, 906969/853504/11597/929; hero session unavailable, 1760055/1678336/12036/2991; interaction 019f8645-a873-7820-a316-be56e2d3ecf0, 1267813/1200896/13401/2150. Post-audit reconciliation found 5 additional source defects and applied all 5: generated-door flags in vision, complete buried-ball lifecycle callbacks, death-message STOP order, the chain deletion rn2 boundary, and the death-comparison short-circuit. Exact reconciled ranges were b79732d..08f9ce9, 08f9ce9..3344557, and 3344557..f140abf; the final range received two parallel read-only reviews with zero findings. Overall milestone counts including reconciliation: 110 raw, 105 deduplicated, 86 confirmed, 51 applied, 35 deferred, 19 rejected, 0 unverified. Warnings: some read-only diff output truncated and was reopened directly; one coverage temporary-directory creation failed and direct source/test tracing was used; one optional glob and one wait timeout were retried; no audit finder or adjudicator was lost. Validation: 729 tests, all four generated-data checks, git diff checks, 178 development screens, exact fresh 3028-call Enhanced1 and 2394-call IBM differentials with matching screens/cursors, and Chromium recorder/browser glyph and full-screen restoration checks passed. The simplification advisory was inspected; source-shaped seams and planned dependencies were retained, so no simplification pass was manufactured. No sealed holdout evaluation or artifact access occurred.
